content: {"file": "@angular/common/fesm22/http.mjs", "summary": "This file contains Angular's HTTP client module, providing services for making HTTP requests and handling responses. It includes classes like HttpClient, HttpBackend, HttpRequest, HttpResponse, and interfaces such as HttpHeaders, HttpParams. Additionally, it offers features to configure interceptors, handle cross-site request forgery (XSRF) protection, and cache HTTP responses during server-side rendering.", "rules": [{"name": "provideHttpClient", "description": "Provides the HttpClient service with specified features like interceptors, XSRF configuration, JSONP support, etc.", "conditions": ["features array provided"], "actions": ["returns environment providers"]}, {"name": "withInterceptors", "description": "Adds custom HTTP interceptor functions to the HttpClient setup.", "conditions": ["interceptor function(s) provided"], "actions": ["returns feature object with provider for interceptors"]}], "dependencies": ["@angular/core", "@angular/common"]}
